2605.23550.title: RA-DCA: A Randomized Active-Set DCA for Directional Stationarity in Max-Structured DC Programs
2605.23550.paper_summary: We study nonsmooth difference-of-convex programs whose subtracted convex term is a finite maximum of smooth convex functions. In this setting, standard DCA iterations may converge to critical points that are not directionally stationary, whereas exact active-vertex screening can be expensive when active sets are large or combinatorial. We propose RA-DCA, a vertex-first randomized active-set DCA that projects active gradients onto sampled directions, checks a sampled vertex residual, and uses a small linear program only as a low-residual convex-combination fallback. The method preserves the descent structure of DCA and reduces the randomized screening layer to matrix multiplications. Under the stated regularity, numerical active-set consistency, and random-embedding assumptions, every accumulation point generated by the safeguarded method is directionally stationary with probability one. MATLAB experiments first test the theorem on degenerate max-affine, max-quadratic, and sparse support-function models, where the safeguard avoids nonstationary critical points and closely tracks a full active-vertex scan. Block top-k tests then show that the same screening idea remains useful when exact aggregate enumeration is combinatorial. Trimmed-regression, complementarity, and QUBO diagnostics separate cases where active-set selection helps from cases dominated by multistart search, the DC split, or other problem-specific features.
2605.23550.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究非光滑的凸差程序，其被減去的凸項是光滑凸函數的有限最大值。在這種情況下，標準的 DCA 迭代可能會收斂到不是方向穩定的臨界點，而當活躍集很大或組合性時，精確的活躍頂點篩選可能會很昂貴。我們提出了 RA-DCA，一種優先考慮頂點的隨機活躍集 DCA，該方法將活躍梯度投影到抽樣方向上，檢查抽樣頂點的殘差，並僅使用小型線性程序作為低殘差的凸組合備用方案。該方法保留了 DCA 的下降結構，並將隨機篩選層減少為矩陣乘法。在所述的正則性、數值活躍集一致性和隨機嵌入假設下，由該保護方法生成的每個累積點以概率一是方向穩定的。MATLAB 實驗首先在退化的最大仿射、最大二次和稀疏支持函數模型上測試該定理，其中保護措施避免了非穩定的臨界點，並緊密跟踪完整的活躍頂點掃描。區塊 top-k 測試隨後顯示，當精確的聚合枚舉是組合性時，相同的篩選思路仍然有用。修剪回歸、互補性和 QUBO 診斷將活躍集選擇有幫助的情況與多啟動搜索、DC 分裂或其他問題特定特徵主導的情況分開。
2605.23550.author: Yi-Shuai Niu et.al.
